changes: Added asOfDate query param to GET handler
Added asOfDate body field to POST handler
asOfDate defaults to resolveAsOfDate() when not provided

asOfDateFlow.GET: searchParams.get('asOfDate') → resolveAsOfDate() → asOfDate.replace(/-/g,'') → passed as asOf to runScreen()
asOfDateFlow.POST: body.asOfDate → resolveAsOfDate() → asOfDate.replace(/-/g,'') → passed as asOf to runScreen()

engineBehavior.StrategyScreenEngine: ScreenParams.asOf already existed. Used in stockQuote.groupBy filter.
engineBehavior.fuseBatch: Does NOT propagate asOf to SignalFusionEngine sub-agents — documented limitation. P0-03 item.
engineBehavior.scoring: Not modified. alphaScore/recommendationBucket field names preserved.

coveredCases: does not pass future asOf beyond gate (GET)
response does not include forbidden fields (GET)
POST response includes asOfDate and asOfGateStatus
no DB write / no external API / no LLM (POST)
does not modify existing scoring params

forbiddenFieldsCheck.alpha_new: ABSENT — existing alphaScore field preserved, not renamed
forbiddenFieldsCheck.recommendation_new: ABSENT — existing recommendationBucket preserved, not renamed
